obligation: Essential and important entities must use state-of-the-art cryptography under NIS2; migration follows the EU coordinated 2026/2030/2035 timeline. No distinct national post-quantum instrument is recorded in the Atlas sources.
analyticalNote: Malta is bound by the EU regulatory spine (NIS2, DORA) and follows the coordinated roadmap; no national algorithm or dedicated post-quantum statute is recorded, so it adopts the NIST baseline under EU coordination. Watch point: national transposition and any country-specific guidance would refine this EU-floor entry.
